items.title: Labour unrest: Can India turn an energy shock into a wage-led economic growth impulse?
items.summary: A wage rise can lift worker health and productivity—what Adam Smith identified as the true source of the wealth of nations. Higher pay levels should also ease demand constraints in the economy. In a war-hit context, such a growth impulse would be valuable.
